Package subscriberGui

Class CarDepositController

java.lang.Object
subscriberGui.CarDepositController
public class CarDepositController extends Object
Controller for the Car Deposit confirmation screen. Displays the assigned parking spot and handles confirmation. This screen is shown when a subscriber chooses to deposit their car.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Sets the rejection flag for the current deposit attempt.

    Sets the assigned parking spot number to display on screen and stores it for saving.

  • Constructor Details

    • CarDepositController

      public CarDepositController()

  • Method Details

    • onLoaded

      public void onLoaded()
      Called manually after the client is injected. Sends a ClientRequest to the server for a random available parking spot.

    • setClient

      public void setClient(ClientController client)
      Injects the active ClientController instance.
      Parameters:
      client - the active ClientController

    • setDepositRejected

      public void setDepositRejected(boolean rejected)
      Sets the rejection flag for the current deposit attempt.
      Parameters:
      rejected - true if the deposit was rejected by the server

    • setSpot

      public void setSpot(String spot)
      Sets the assigned parking spot number to display on screen and stores it for saving.
      Parameters:
      spot - the assigned parking spot (e.g., "6")
